---
name: 📖 Documentation
about: Report a problem with, or suggest an improvement to, the documentation
title: "[Docs]: "
labels: ["documentation", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## What documentation is affected?

- [ ] `README.md`
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` (engineering handbook)
- [ ] `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] `ROADMAP.md`
- [ ] Inline code comments / docstrings
- [ ] `.env.example` / setup instructions
- [ ] Other (please specify below)

Link or path to the specific section, if you can:

## What's the problem?

Describe what's unclear, missing, outdated, or incorrect.

> Example: "The Quick Start says to run `uvicorn app.api:app` from the repo
> root, but it only works from inside `src/`."

## Suggested improvement

How would you fix or clarify it? A proposed wording, a missing step, or a
correction — whatever you have.

## Additional context

Anything else that would help — the command you ran, what you expected the docs
to tell you, screenshots, etc.

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues and this hasn't been reported already.
- [ ] I'm willing to open a pull request for this change. *(optional — no
      pressure, but it helps us prioritize)*
